concepts.name: ThemeManifest shape and validation (zod ThemeManifestSchema + validateManifest())
buildThemeOverride(manifest) / cached getChakraTheme(id) transform
concepts.note: override forwards shape.borderWidths (parity-neutral: outside AC9 ALLOWLIST, tested).

concepts.name: Font declaration union + Google Fonts CSS2 URL construction (FontLoad, buildThemeFonts, buildFontLinkHref)
WCAG contrast gate: real-hex pair evaluation at AA 4.5:1, never trusting colorScheme/contentSurface as a shortcut
ElevationName catalog (flat|softDrop|hardDrop|pixelBevel|floralGlow) for card/button/nav
IconSetName catalog (line|filled|pixel) and icon-name -> iconify id maps
SurfacePatternName catalog (none|studs|grid|petals) and appBg gradients
Generated registry shape: AppThemeName union, APP_THEMES sorted by order, THEME_FONTS deduped union
themes/index.ts public API re-exported by lib/theme.ts
One manifest.ts per theme folder; folder basename === manifest.id (drives auto-detection)
Generator emits only a folder-name-derived scaffold and never imports/evaluates TypeScript; --check is idempotent
AC9 parity baseline is captured from the unmodified getChakraTheme before any src/ refactor and never regenerated afterward
themes-validation.test.ts composes schema/contrast/drift/metadata-freshness/order-uniqueness/font-URL/zod-boundary checks and gates prebuild

lib/theme.ts keeps pre-refactor exported names and call signatures (isAppThemeName, normalizeThemeName, getThemeDefinition, getChakraTheme, DEFAULT_THEME_NAME, AppThemeName) for its 6 existing consumers
zod stays out of the client bundle: only the generator and tests import schema.ts at runtime; every client-bundle-reachable module uses import type only
concepts.dependency_declared: app/package.json devDependencies zod 4.4.3 (exact, devDep not dependency — client-bundle-safe). AC-BOUND-1 architectural test still carried to S3.
concepts.s1_early_guard: zodBoundary.test.ts hardened with resolved-target runtime-import scanner (S1 modules only) + 12 negative self-tests. Full AC-BOUND-1 walk (incl _document/useThemeStyles/ThemeIcon) still carried to S3.

concepts.name: order is a required unique positive integer across all themes; APP_THEMES is sorted ascending by order

AC-PARITY-1 must assert with toEqual, never toStrictEqual: the JSON baseline cannot represent the undefined-valued styles.global.body.background* keys the live pick carries (calm/playful). The generated-file HEADER now pins this, but it is a convention-not-structure mitigation — S2 review MUST confirm the actual assertion operator.
concepts.mitigation: generated-file HEADER pins toEqual and forbids toStrictEqual
concepts.resolution: parity.test.ts uses toEqual with documented reason; exercises S0 baseline via public getChakraTheme(id); full-extend guard present.

concepts.name: spec §6.4 metadata-freshness test is vacuous as literally worded (recompute-from-manifests vs committed-registry-that-also-recomputes). Real drift already covered by AC-FONT-1 (fontLoad) + AC8b (order uniqueness). S3 must materialize a committed order/fonts snapshot OR narrow AC8.
concepts.resolution: AC-VAL-3 amended (spec.md Amendments 2026-07-01): order-position sub-clause retired (vacuous under eval-time computation + contradicts §12). Font drift → AC-FONT-1; order collision → AC-VAL-4; folder drift → AC-VAL-3 clause 1. No US2 loss.

concepts.name: evaluateThemeContrast now FAILS (not silently passes) on non-hex color tokens after S1 remediation (isParsableHexColor guard). S3 validation test should still assert hex format on gate tokens; S5 authoring guide must state hex-only.
concepts.resolution: runtime fail-loud (S1) + validation test asserts non-hex token fails + colorScheme-never-trusted (S3). S5 authoring guide still owns the hex-only doc statement.

concepts.name: ElevationName/SurfacePatternName/IconSetName/ContentPanelName + FontLoad duplicated between schema.ts (zod enums) and treatments/*+fontUnion.ts (TS unions), hand-synced only (Boundary Rules forbid the edge). Currently in sync; no structural/test guard.
concepts.verify_in_story: S3 (drift test: zod enum options === treatment Record keys)
concepts.s2_extension: ElevationName now also duplicated in index.ts (ELEVATION_TO_VISUAL_STYLE) — a THIRD site while the compat bridge exists. S3 drift test should also assert index.ts ELEVATION_TO_VISUAL_STYLE keys === treatments/elevation.ts ElevationName options (until S4 removes the bridge).
concepts.resolution: themes-validation.test.ts asserts 4 zod enums === treatment Record keys (non-tautological) + index.ts ELEVATION_TO_VISUAL_STYLE 3rd site + FontLoadSchema===FontLoad. Revisit at S4 (3rd site removed when compat bridge torn down).

concepts.name: buildChakraTheme.getChakraTheme(manifest) (lazy cache by manifest.id) vs public getChakraTheme(id). S2 index.ts must bridge id→APP_THEMES[id]→getChakraTheme without a name collision; eager-warm optional (Constraint 9 intent = referential stability, already preserved).
concepts.resolution: index.ts getChakraTheme(id)→REGISTRY_APP_THEMES[id]→getCachedChakraTheme (aliased, no collision); referential stability preserved.

concepts.name: index.ts re-exports ThemeVisualStyle to mirror lib/theme at S1; Constraint 3 directs deleting it in S4 alongside dropping visualStyle/isFunTheme from the hook return.

getThemeDefinition(id).visualStyle must equal {calm:soft,playful:rounded,lego:toy,minecraft:pixel,flower:floral} — load-bearing for useThemeStyles/ThemeIcon branch selection; correct in S2, being test-locked in S2 remediation; target changes when S4 removes the compat field.
concepts.resolution: replaced by stronger output-level locks (useThemeStyles.test.ts 6-field BoxProps + ThemeIcon.test.ts icon ids); compatBridge.test.ts deletion dropped no coverage.

concepts.name: S3 metadata-freshness + folder-drift tests MUST diff against registry.generated.ts PURE APP_THEMES/THEME_FONTS, never index.ts compat-augmented APP_THEMES (4 extra derived fields would cause spurious diff or mask a real one).
concepts.resolution: folder-drift test diffs REGISTRY_APP_THEMES (pure), never index.ts augmented.

concepts.name: S4 must remove visualStyle/labelKey/descriptionKey from AppThemeDefinition AND migrate useThemeStyles.ts/ThemeIcon.tsx/profile.tsx to read manifest.treatments/contentSurface/label/description/colors.backgroundImage directly, AND delete ELEVATION_TO_VISUAL_STYLE, AND remove the 10 i18n *Description keys, AND delete-or-repoint compatBridge.test.ts + remove the index.ts 3rd-site assertion from the enum-sync test. AppThemeDefinition collapses to = ThemeManifest.
concepts.resolution: every teardown item verified: AppThemeDefinition=ThemeManifest, toCompatDefinition/ELEVATION_TO_VISUAL_STYLE/ThemeVisualStyle deleted, compatBridge.test.ts deleted, 3rd-site enum-sync removed (others kept), 10 i18n keys removed, no residual compat identifier. tsc clean.

concepts.name: AC-DEP-2 build-abort property is verified (broke manifest id → prebuild exit 1) but not auto-tested (that would test npm lifecycle, not epic code). S5 authoring guide must document the repeatable verification recipe (AC-DOC-1 'how to validate locally').
concepts.resolution: guide §9 documents the build-abort recipe (multi-assertion cascade from folder→id mismatch), verified by execution.

concepts.name: S5 authoring guide/README must document the FINAL post-teardown manifest shape + treatment catalog, state the hex-only contrast requirement (closes doc portion of contrast-gate-requires-hex-tokens), and must NOT reference removed compat fields (visualStyle/labelKey/descriptionKey) or the retired AC-VAL-3 order-position sub-clause. Also include the AC-DEP-2 verification recipe (from ac-dep-2-verification-recipe).
concepts.resolution: guide documents final post-teardown shape + treatment catalog + hex contrast; no removed compat fields; order described as intended-edit/collision-only (not the retired order-position sub-clause). Two minor doc findings remediated.

stories.title: baseline capture
stories.notes: No src/ change (git diff HEAD -- app/src/lib/theme.ts empty). ALLOWLIST matches spec §6.8. Stage-1 Opus converged clean after 1 remediation round (header toEqual pin, docstring accuracy, pickAllowlist fail-loud). Codex P2s: zod-dep routed to S3 scope; metadata-freshness carried to S3; mark-complete transient.

stories.title: Scaffold themes/ pure-data and transform modules
stories.notes: Opus clean after 2 remediation rounds (contrast fail-loud, code-unit font sort; zod devDep, borderWidths forward). Codex Stage-2 partial (found the 2 P2s pre-outage; post-fix Codex confirmation blocked by credit outage — Opus-reconfirmed). zod pinned exact 4.4.3.

stories.title: Migrate the five existing themes into manifests + registry stub
stories.notes: Parity verified (toEqual vs S0 baseline, full-extend guard, 1716 pass). Compat bridge covers all consumer reads; visualStyle reverse-map correct for all 5 (test-lock added in remediation). No import cycle. zod boundary preserved. MOCK-02-001 (registry stub) resolves S3.

stories.title: Generator + validation gate
stories.notes: --check byte-exact (MOCK-02-001 resolved). zod source-scan teeth (13 self-tests)+real-bundle grep clean. AC-VAL-3 amendment sound. Two test-quality findings remediated (tautological id===folder; AC-STRUCT-2 comment brittleness).

stories.title: Wire consumers + compat-bridge teardown
stories.notes: Byte-identical verified (navBannerDecor diffed vs git HEAD; 6 ThemeStyles fields frozen-locked non-tautological; ICON_MAP frozen-locked). Teardown complete+consistent. Opus clean first pass. Codex Stage-2 skipped (outage).

stories.title: Authoring guide + README
stories.notes: Docs-only. Field ref/treatment catalog/contrast pairs+threshold/FontLoad/AC-DEP-2 cascade verified accurate vs source; worked-sample ratios independently recomputed (match). Two minor findings remediated (sunrise folder-name consistency; hex-rule scoping).
